changes.value:
## What

Change the builtin file-content validators from `trigger: PostToolUse` to `trigger: Stop`. These validators currently fire on every Write/Edit call, causing slowdown. Moving to Stop makes them batch-validate once per turn.

### Files to modify:
- `builtin/validators/code-quality/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Change `trigger: PostToolUse` Ôćĺ `trigger: Stop`, remove `match.tools`
- `builtin/validators/security-rules/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Same change
- `builtin/validators/test-integrity/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Same change

### What stays the same:
- `builtin/validators/command-safety/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Stays `trigger: PreToolUse` (must block BEFORE shell execution, not after)
- All `match.files` patterns remain ÔÇö they'll now filter against accumulated changed files instead of the single file being edited

### Approach:
1. Change `trigger:` from `PostToolUse` to `Stop`
2. Remove `match.tools` section (Stop hooks don't have a tool_name to match against)
3. Keep `match.files` with `@file_groups/source_code` and `@file_groups/test_files` patterns
4. Update validator body descriptions if they reference \"this file\" to reference \"changed files\"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] code-quality, security-rules, test-integrity all trigger on Stop
- [ ] command-safety remains PreToolUse (unchanged)
- [ ] File patterns are preserved and work against accumulated changed files
- [ ] Validators only fire when relevant files were changed in the turn

## Tests
- [ ] Verify builtin validator loading still works: `cargo nextest run -p avp-common -- builtin`
- [ ] Manual test: edit a .rs file, verify code-quality runs at Stop not per-edit
- [ ] Run `cargo nextest run` (full suite) to catch regressions"
Migrate builtin PostToolUse validators to Stop trigger

+2. Change frontmatter: `trigger: PostToolUse` Ôćĺ `trigger: Stop`
+3. Remove `match.tools` section (Stop hooks don't have a tool_name to match against)
+4. Keep `match.files` with `@file_groups/source_code` and `@file_groups/test_files` patterns
+5. Update validator body descriptions if they reference \"this file\" to reference \"changed files\"
+

 ## What

-Change the builtin file-content validators from `trigger: PostToolUse` to `trigger: Stop`. These validators currently fire on every Write/Edit call, causing slowdown. Moving to Stop makes them batch-validate once per turn.
+Change the builtin file-content validators from `trigger: PostToolUse` to `trigger: Stop` where appropriate. These validators currently fire on every Write/Edit call, causing slowdown. Moving to Stop makes them batch-validate once per turn.

 ### Files to modify:
 - `builtin/validators/code-quality/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Change `trigger: PostToolUse` Ôćĺ `trigger: Stop`, remove `match.tools`
-- `builtin/validators/security-rules/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Same change
 - `builtin/validators/test-integrity/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Same change

-### What stays the same:
-- `builtin/validators/command-safety/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Stays `trigger: PreToolUse` (must block BEFORE shell execution, not after)
+### What stays the same (tool-based, must block immediately):
+- `builtin/validators/command-safety/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Stays `trigger: PreToolUse` (must block BEFORE shell execution)
+- `builtin/validators/security-rules/VALIDATOR.md` ÔÇö Stays `trigger: PostToolUse` (catching secrets is a right-now problem, can't wait until Stop)
 - All `match.files` patterns remain ÔÇö they'll now filter against accumulated changed files instead of the single file being edited

 ### Approach (TDD):
@@ -15,14 +15,15 @@
 Use `/tdd` workflow. Write failing tests FIRST, then implement.

 1. Write/update tests that assert builtin validators have correct trigger types
-2. Change frontmatter: `trigger: PostToolUse` Ôćĺ `trigger: Stop`
-3. Remove `match.tools` section (Stop hooks don't have a tool_name to match against)
+2. Change frontmatter: `trigger: PostToolUse` Ôćĺ `trigger: Stop` for code-quality and test-integrity
+3. Remove `match.tools` section from migrated validators (Stop hooks don't have a tool_name)
 4. Keep `match.files` with `@file_groups/source_code` and `@file_groups/test_files` patterns
 5. Update validator body descriptions if they reference \"this file\" to reference \"changed files\"

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] code-quality, security-rules, test-integrity all trigger on Stop
+- [ ] code-quality and test-integrity trigger on Stop
 - [ ] command-safety remains PreToolUse (unchanged)
+- [ ] security-rules remains PostToolUse (unchanged ÔÇö secrets must be caught immediately)
 - [ ] File patterns are preserved and work against accumulated changed files
 - [ ] Validators only fire when relevant files were changed in the turn
